notes: B20 diagnostic build. Same HTTP 400 strategy as #279, but with logging to verify status_code parsing in convert_to_http2_response. Check: (1) Does the browser show 400 or 200 status? (2) Is there any error toast/message visible? (3) Any console errors? Report the exact HTTP status code shown in DevTools Network tab for the message.newChat request. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용.
